description: Constants expose Teams and Enterprise add-on keys, labels, and descriptions
TierContext hasAddOn returns true for Teams and Enterprise add-ons when present
Entra guard returns 403 without Enterprise add-on and passes with it
Teams availability rejects without Teams add-on and passes with it
Stripe purchaseAddOn creates checkout for Teams and Enterprise add-ons with selected add-on metadata
Manual smoke: tier alone no longer unlocks Teams or Entra; active add-on does
